allow: PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","User"\); cd d:\\siteglace; npm run dev)

PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","User"\); cd d:\\siteglace; git init; git add .; git commit -m "Initial commit - página de vendas Glacê Espelhado Premium")

PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","User"\); $p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if \($p\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; Write-Host "Processo $p encerrado" }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; cd d:\\siteglace; node server.js)

PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","User"\); $p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if \($p\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; cd d:\\siteglace; node server.js)

PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","User"\); $key = \(Get-Content d:\\siteglace\\.env | Where-Object { $_ -match "ABACATEPAY_API_KEY" }\) -replace "ABACATEPAY_API_KEY=",""; $headers = @{ "Authorization" = "Bearer $key"; "Content-Type" = "application/json" }; $body = '{"data":{"amount":2999,"description":"Teste","expiresIn":3600,"customer":{"name":"Teste","email":"teste@teste.com","cellphone":"11999999999","taxId":"00000000000"}}}'; $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.api.abacatepay.com/v2/transparents/create" -Method POST -Headers $headers -Body $body -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "STATUS: $\($resp.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "BODY: $\($resp.Content\)")

PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","User"\); $key = \(Get-Content d:\\siteglace\\.env | Where-Object { $_ -match "ABACATEPAY_API_KEY" }\) -replace "ABACATEPAY_API_KEY=",""; $headers = @{ "Authorization" = "Bearer $key" }; Write-Host "--- GET /billing/list ---"; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.abacatepay.com/v1/billing/list" -Headers $headers -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\) BODY: $\($r.Content\)"; Write-Host "--- GET /store/get ---"; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.abacatepay.com/v1/store/get" -Headers $headers -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "STATUS: $\($r2.StatusCode\) BODY: $\($r2.Content\)")

PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","User"\); $key = "abc_dev_3LDf0YPQwsej3RRjTRhbsYb5"; $headers = @{ "Authorization" = "Bearer $key"; "Content-Type" = "application/json" }; $body = '{"data":{"amount":2999,"description":"Teste","expiresIn":3600,"customer":{"name":"Teste Silva","email":"teste@teste.com","cellphone":"11999999999","taxId":"00000000000"}}}'; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.abacatepay.com/v1/transparents/create" -Method POST -Headers $headers -Body $body -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host $r.Content)

PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","User"\); $key = "abc_dev_3LDf0YPQwsej3RRjTRhbsYb5"; $headers = @{ "Authorization" = "Bearer $key"; "Content-Type" = "application/json" }; $endpoints = @\("billing/create","checkouts/create","payment-links/create"\); foreach \($ep in $endpoints\) { Write-Host "--- POST /v1/$ep ---"; $body = '{"amount":2999}'; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.abacatepay.com/v1/$ep" -Method POST -Headers $headers -Body $body -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($r\) { Write-Host $r.Content } else { Write-Host "Erro/Not found" } })

PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","User"\); $key = "abc_dev_3LDf0YPQwsej3RRjTRhbsYb5"; $headers = @{ "Authorization" = "Bearer $key"; "Content-Type" = "application/json" }; $body = '{"frequency":"ONE_TIME","methods":["PIX"],"products":[{"externalId":"glace-001","name":"Glace Espelhado Premium","quantity":1,"price":2999}],"returnUrl":"http://localhost:3000","completionUrl":"http://localhost:3000","customer":{"name":"Teste Silva","email":"teste@teste.com","cellphone":"11999999999","taxId":"00000000000"}}'; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.abacatepay.com/v1/billing/create" -Method POST -Headers $headers -Body $body -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host $r.Content)

PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","User"\); $key = "abc_dev_3LDf0YPQwsej3RRjTRhbsYb5"; $headers = @{ "Authorization" = "Bearer $key"; "Content-Type" = "application/json" }; $body = '{"data":{"amount":2999,"description":"Glace Espelhado Premium","expiresIn":3600,"customer":{"name":"Teste Silva","email":"teste@teste.com","cellphone":"11999999999","taxId":"00000000000"}}}'; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.abacatepay.com/v2/transparents/create" -Method POST -Headers $headers -Body $body -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host $r.Content)

PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","User"\); $key = "abc_dev_3LDf0YPQwsej3RRjTRhbsYb5"; $headers = @{ "Authorization" = "Bearer $key"; "Content-Type" = "application/json" }; $body = '{"amount":2999,"description":"Glace Espelhado Premium","expiresIn":3600,"customer":{"name":"Teste Silva","email":"teste@teste.com","cellphone":"11999999999","taxId":"00000000000"}}'; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.abacatepay.com/v2/transparents/create" -Method POST -Headers $headers -Body $body -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host $r.Content)

PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","User"\); $key = "abc_dev_3LDf0YPQwsej3RRjTRhbsYb5"; $headers = @{ "Authorization" = "Bearer $key"; "Content-Type" = "application/json" }; # Tenta com customer como string vazia para ver qual campo especificamente quer 'object' $body1 = '{"amount":2999}'; $r1 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.abacatepay.com/v2/transparents/create" -Method POST -Headers $headers -Body $body1 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "SEM customer: $\($r1.Content\)"; # Tenta com metadata $body2 = '{"amount":2999,"metadata":{}}'; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.abacatepay.com/v2/transparents/create" -Method POST -Headers $headers -Body $body2 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "COM metadata: $\($r2.Content\)")

PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","User"\); $key = "abc_dev_3LDf0YPQwsej3RRjTRhbsYb5"; $headers = @{ "Authorization" = "Bearer $key"; "Content-Type" = "application/json" }; $body = '{"amount":2999}'; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.abacatepay.com/v2/transparents/create" -Method POST -Headers $headers -Body $body; $r | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 } catch { $_.ErrorDetails.Message })

PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","User"\); $key = "abc_dev_3LDf0YPQwsej3RRjTRhbsYb5"; $headers = @{ "Authorization" = "Bearer $key"; "Content-Type" = "application/json" }; # Variações possíveis do body $tests = @\( '{"amount":{"value":2999}}', '{"value":2999,"currency":"BRL"}', '{"price":2999}', '{"total":2999}' \); foreach \($b in $tests\) { Write-Host "Body: $b"; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.abacatepay.com/v2/transparents/create" -Method POST -Headers $headers -Body $b; $r | ConvertTo-Json } catch { $_.ErrorDetails.Message }; Write-Host "---" })

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://api.abacatepay.com/v2/transparents/create -H 'Authorization: Bearer abc_dev_3LDf0YPQwsej3RRjTRhbsYb5' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Accept: application/json' -d '{"amount":2999}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://api.abacatepay.com/v2/transparents/create -H 'Authorization: Bearer abc_dev_3LDf0YPQwsej3RRjTRhbsYb5' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'x-pdv-token: abc_dev_3LDf0YPQwsej3RRjTRhbsYb5' -d '{"amount":2999}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://api.abacatepay.com/v2/transparents/create -H 'Authorization: Bearer abc_dev_3LDf0YPQwsej3RRjTRhbsYb5' -H 'Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8' -d '{"amount":2999}')
